name: Hey Hey Sauerkraut Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/3 to 1/2 cup fine dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook sausage and onion until sausage is brown, breaking it into small pieces.
2. Drain the sauerkraut, pressing out as much liquid as possible.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sauerkraut, sausage mixture, 2 tablespoons bread crumbs, cream cheese, parsley, mustard, garlic salt, and pepper. Cover and chill several hours or overnight.
4. In a shallow container, mix flour. In another shallow container, beat eggs and water until combined. Place bread crumbs in a third container.
5. Using about 2 tablespoons of the sauerkraut mixture for each ball, shape into balls.
6. Roll each ball first in flour, then in egg mixture, and finally in bread crumbs.
7. Fry a few at a time in deep hot fat (365 degrees) for about 2 minutes or until brown. Remove from fat with a slotted spoon; drain on paper towels.
8. Transfer to a baking sheet with sides; keep warm in a 275 degree oven. Makes 24 to 30 balls.
